avoid: blindly adding more agents without improving structure
over-investing in UI polish before verifier, persistence, and evidence tracing are solid

versions.goal: move the system from runnable to stable

tasks.title: Upgrade Verifier
tasks.description: Turn the current review stage into a stronger verifier that checks modeling completeness, solver schema integrity, and whether the report actually cites computed evidence.
todo: add per-subproblem verification verdicts
check objective, constraints, and chosen_method completeness
check structured_result schema completeness and validity
check that report conclusions cite solver outputs
emit structured verifier output instead of only loose findings
expected_outputs: clear severity and evidence per finding

tasks.title: Persist Web Sessions
tasks.description: Store web sessions so the user can refresh, resume, and browse earlier modeling tasks.
todo: persist web sessions to sqlite
restore session after page refresh
list historical sessions
reopen previous session state

tasks.title: Unify Error Feedback
tasks.description: Return consistent structured errors for upload, solving, writing, and runtime failures so the UI can display actionable diagnostics instead of generic 500 errors.
todo: normalize backend errors into a shared schema
capture upload, solve, write, and runtime stages
surface actionable messages to frontend
record the latest failed stage in state

tasks.title: Build Evidence Chain Foundation
tasks.description: Track which solver runs, artifacts, and subproblems support each report section and major conclusion.
todo: add sources metadata for each report section
map report sections to subproblem and artifact IDs
persist report source metadata in state

versions.goal: make the system feel like a real assistant instead of only a workflow runner

tasks.title: Formalize the Skill System
tasks.description: Split the current embedded solver templates into standalone skill modules with explicit match conditions, schemas, and execution logic.
todo: extract forecast, optimization, path, and evaluation skills into dedicated modules
define a shared SkillSpec
add match(context) and run(context) interfaces
separate templates from orchestration logic

tasks.title: Add Automatic Replanning
tasks.description: Let the system detect what needs to be recomputed when the user adds new constraints, uploads new data, or changes only the writing requirements.
todo: classify incoming changes by impact scope
reuse unaffected solver results when possible
rerun only affected stages and subproblems

tasks.title: Upgrade Report Templates
tasks.description: Provide more detailed and style-aware report templates, including contest-oriented and academic variants, with support for Chinese and English output.
todo: split report into finer sections and templates
support multiple report styles
support bilingual output modes

tasks.title: Add Chart Generation
tasks.description: Generate charts from solver results and reference them inside the final report.
todo: create chart artifacts from numeric results
store charts as artifacts
embed or reference charts in reports

versions.goal: turn the system into a platform-like prototype

tasks.title: Build History Management
tasks.description: Add session listing, search, reopen, and clone behavior in the web interface.
todo: show all stored sessions
search sessions by metadata
clone old session as a new task

tasks.title: Add Data Preview and Manual Column Mapping
tasks.description: After upload, let the user preview tables and manually correct semantic column mappings when heuristics are insufficient.
todo: preview uploaded tables in frontend
allow manual role mapping for columns
persist corrected mappings into session state

tasks.title: Build an Artifact Browser
tasks.description: Let users inspect solver code, result.json, intermediate data, and generated figures from the web UI.
todo: list artifacts by run and subproblem
preview text/json/code artifacts
link report content back to artifacts

tasks.title: Expand External Tooling
tasks.description: Add richer tool integrations such as LaTeX export, PDF export, reference management, and external retrieval.
todo: support LaTeX export
support PDF export
add reference retrieval and management hooks

versions.goal: become a usable mathematical modeling paper production system
capabilities: complete markdown and latex paper output

next_step_recommendation.reason: These two tasks improve usability immediately and make later verifier and evidence work much easier to build and debug.
